title: Rust coverage uplift: console_local bin module
description: Target rust/src/bin/console_local.rs (~37.46%, ~895 uncovered lines). Add focused tests for error branches, env/IO edge cases, and handler paths to materially raise line coverage.
creator: ryan.porter

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Coverage progress: expanded rust/src/bin/console_local.rs tests to cover tenant-scoped API handlers, asset route wrappers, and favicon behavior (missing -> 204, present -> 200). Also corrected notification endpoint expectations (returns 200). Validation run: cargo test --locked --bin kbsc => 36 passed, 0 failed.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Validation update:
- cargo test --locked --bin kbsc -> 36 passed
- Full rust coverage rerun (all-features, lib+bins+tests, steps excluded) produced coverage-rust/cobertura.xml
- Current module delta: rust/src/bin/console_local.rs now 57.93% line coverage (1213/2094)
- Current overall Rust line coverage from Cobertura root: 81.70%
Note: coverage ratchet check is currently blocked locally because coverage-python/coverage.xml is missing in this workspace.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Coverage progress (new increment implemented):
- Added targeted kbsc tests in rust/src/bin/console_local.rs for success-path wrappers and edge branches:
  - root + tenant issue endpoints with seeded issue data
  - full tenant wiki round-trip (create/list/get/update/rename/render/delete)
  - d2 render endpoint fallback when d2 is unavailable (PATH forced empty)
- Added helper seed/write logic for deterministic project fixtures in tests.
- Validation: cargo test --locked --bin kbsc -> 39 passed, 0 failed.
- Re-ran full rust llvm-cov (all-features, lib+bins+tests, steps excluded) and refreshed coverage-rust/cobertura.xml.
- Module delta: console_local.rs improved to 66.22% line coverage (1498/2262).
- Overall Rust line coverage is now 83.48%.
